headlines.headline: NBA championship and Finals MVP odds: Pistons 30-1 to win championship
headlines.description: The Pistons are slight favorites over the Cavaliers heading into Sunday's Game 7.

headlines.headline: Game 7s have been kind to Cavaliers, Pistons over the years. But one will fall on Sunday
headlines.description: Game 7. That's a phrase that surely brings back a lot of good memories for fans of the Cleveland Cavaliers and Detroit Pistons.

headlines.headline: Edwards unsure how Wolves can get over hump after loss to Spurs
headlines.description: With Game 6 out of reach, Anthony Edwards walked over to the Spurs bench to "give them their respect" after the Timberwolves fell short in the playoffs for the third straight season.

headlines.headline: NBA to unveil MVP on Sunday, day before Thunder-Spurs series
headlines.description: The NBA will announce this season's MVP winner on Sunday night, the day before two of the finalists, OKC's Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and the Spurs' Victor Wembanyama, meet in Game 1 of the Western Conference finals.

headlines.headline: Spurs oust Wolves in Game 6 blowout, get OKC in West finals
headlines.description: Stephon Castle, De'Aaron Fox and Dylan Harper accounted for nearly half of the Spurs' scoring in a series-clinching 139-109 win over the Timberwolves to set up a Western Conference finals clash with the Thunder.

headlines.headline: Which NBA teams have never won a championship?
headlines.description: Some NBA teams have scored multiple titles, but which franchises have never won? Check out this list for more championship context.

headlines.headline: UFL: In-game ref interviews strengthening transparency
headlines.description: The UFL believes in-game discussions can help focus postgame conversations on the competition rather than calls.

headlines.headline: Jags' DaVon Hamilton opens up about being 'almost paralyzed'
headlines.description: In 2023, Jaguars doctors had never seen this type of infection in an NFL player.

headlines.headline: Examiner: Josh Mauro died from fentanyl, cocaine, ethanol overdose
headlines.description: Former NFL defensive lineman Josh Mauro died from an acute combination of fentanyl, cocaine and ethanol intoxication, according to online records from the Maricopa County Office of the Medical Examiner.

headlines.headline: Fantasy football: Weighing the impact of each of the nine bye weeks in 2026 (watch out for Weeks 6 and 11)
headlines.description: With the schedule revealed, we look at the potential pitfalls, quirks, and reveal if -- and when -- Bye-maggedon will be upon us.

headlines.headline: Andy Reid: Mahomes is getting better every day
headlines.description: Chiefs head coach Andy Reid joins "The Rich Eisen Show" to discuss Patrick Mahomes' progress in his return from injury.

headlines.headline: NFL says it's following fan interest with midweek games
headlines.description: Increased ratings and the league's focus on holiday seasons could lead to more games on nontraditional days, NFL officials said.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Canadiens favored in series against Sabres, Hurricanes await
headlines.description: The Colorado Avalanche, Carolina Hurricanes and Vegas Golden Knights remain the Stanley Cup favorites.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket
headlines.description: The Canadiens can close out the series on Saturday, with the Hurricanes waiting for the series winner.

headlines.headline: Reports: PWHL chooses San Jose as its 4th expansion market
headlines.description: The PWHL is bringing women's hockey to the San Francisco Bay Area by choosing San Jose, California, as its fourth and final market during the league's latest round of expansion, according to multiple reports.

headlines.headline: Wild's Brodin, Eriksson Ek missed series with broken bones in feet
headlines.description: Defenseman Jonas Brodin and center Joel Eriksson Ek were unable to play for Minnesota in the second-round series against Colorado because of broken bones in their feet, the veteran stalwarts revealed Friday in season-ending interviews with reporters.

headlines.headline: Golden Knights lose pick, coach fined for boxing out media
headlines.description: The NHL has stripped the Golden Knights of their second-round pick and fined coach John Tortorella $100,000 for the team's decision to avoid speaking to the media after its series-clinching win over the Ducks.

headlines.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs: Avalanche-Golden Knights conference finals preview
headlines.description: Who will represent the West in the Stanley Cup Final? Get set with key stats, schedule and more.
